# Lost Gift Cards

If a physical gift card is lost, it can be replaced only if the customer presents the original purchase receipt or order number. The remaining balance on the lost card will be transferred to the new card. However, gift cards that have already used their balance cannot be reissued.

[Source: gift_cards.md#lost-gift-cards]
